title: End Spawn
description: This datapack allows you to spawn directly in the End dimension.
body:
# End Spawn

This datapack allows you to spawn directly in the End dimension.

I made this datapack to work together with my [End Survival Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/end-survival) for my YouTube Series [End Survival](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLir0xFpj1ZKO5peL3jJCJpIAvC28EwvUT).
